# discord_webhook (Resource)

Manages a Discord webhook.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `channel_id` (String) The ID of the channel the webhook is for.
- `name` (String) The name of the webhook (1-80 characters).
- `server_id` (String) The ID of the server the webhook belongs to.

### Optional

- `avatar` (String) The base64-encoded avatar for the webhook.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The ID of the webhook.
- `token` (String, Sensitive) The token of the webhook. Only returned when creating and not available later.
